novel_features.name: Front Page Diff
novel_features.description: See what changed on the front page since you last checked — new stories, disappeared stories, and rank movers
novel_features.rationale: Requires local snapshot of previous front page state that no API provides

novel_features.name: Thread Summarizer
novel_features.description: Condense a massive comment thread into key arguments, consensus, and dissenting views
novel_features.rationale: Requires fetching and analyzing the full comment tree locally

novel_features.name: Topic Pulse
novel_features.description: See what HN is saying about any topic this week — frequency, points, and velocity
novel_features.rationale: Requires Algolia date-range search with local aggregation across multiple result pages

novel_features.name: Who's Hiring Analytics
novel_features.description: See the most requested languages, remote %, and salary mentions across months of Who's Hiring threads
novel_features.rationale: Requires syncing and parsing multiple monthly hiring threads — no single API call provides this

novel_features.name: Submission Tracker
novel_features.description: Track your submissions — which got traction, which died, your average score, and best posting time
novel_features.rationale: Requires syncing a user's full submission history and computing statistics locally
